blockingIssues.description: For registered webhook adapters, the route calls `adapter.receiveWebhook(...)` and then immediately calls `store.insert(event)` + `eventBus.emitNotification(event)` again. But `IntegrationRegistry.loadIntegration()` already wires `adapter.onEvent(...)` to persist + emit, so webhook events are duplicated (double insert/double push) in the adapter path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission feature skill metadata and transcript-location guidance with available runtime skills and actual transcript storage paths.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `/Users/teodorwaltervido/.factory/missions/aba4091c-f606-4117-af40-1e9c221d196b/features.json` shows `skillName: "worker"`; `/Users/teodorwaltervido/Desktop/service/.factory/skills` is empty; fix session evidence appears in `/Users/teodorwaltervido/.factory/sessions/-Users-teodorwaltervido/5ec5c958-8045-4e40-b902-7e1706cb38e5.jsonl` and mission `progress_log.jsonl` rather than mission transcript rows for that session ID.

notes: Re-run executed after f-fix-m1-scrutiny completion. Validators pass, but fix review reports a remaining blocking webhook duplication issue in the registered adapter path.
